## What
Briefly describe the change.

## Why
What problem does it solve? Link the issue: Closes #

## How it was tested
- [ ] `ruff check muselm/ tests/` passes
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the changed behavior
- [ ] Updated docs (README / ARCHITECTURE / ROADMAP) if the interface changed

## Notes for reviewers
Anything non-obvious: trade-offs, benchmarks, follow-ups.
